client.name: Gaurang Gohil - Compliance Risk & Controls
client.label: Senior AML, compliance operations, risk, controls, and regulatory training leader with cross-border financial-services experience
client.work_authorization: Permanent Polish Residence Card (EU long-term resident) - authorized to work in Poland/EU without sponsorship; immediate availability

core_positioning.notes: This profile is specifically for compliance, risk, controls, AML operations, and operations-leadership roles. Best-fit targets include Head/Director/Manager level roles across Compliance, Risk & Control, AML Operations, Regulatory Operations, Financial Crime Operations, and Operational Excellence in financial services, banking, and fintech. Preserve the compliance-first narrative and do not blend in broad learning-operations language unless it directly supports regulatory training leadership. Strongest evidence comes from audit reduction, cost savings, compliance monitoring, board reporting, cross-jurisdiction operations, and regulatory training delivery.

summary_base: AML compliance and risk leader with 9+ years of experience across regulatory operations, audit readiness, controls, partner-risk oversight, and team leadership in global financial-services environments.

Strongest evidence includes reducing audit findings by 70%, generating $1M+ in cost savings, delivering 80% efficiency gains through system and workflow modernization, and leading compliance operations supporting 30,000+ partners across multiple jurisdictions.

Best positioned for Compliance, Risk & Control, AML Operations, Regulatory Operations, and operations-leadership roles where regulatory rigor, team leadership, analytics, and execution discipline matter.

experience.summary: Senior compliance-operations leadership role overseeing regulatory monitoring, audit readiness, training execution, analytics, and board-level reporting across a global partner network.
highlights: **Architected an enterprise-wide compliance monitoring framework for 30,000+ international partners** across multiple jurisdictions, strengthening visibility into partner risk and regulatory exposure.
**Reduced regulatory audit findings by 70%** through advanced data analytics, proactive risk identification, and stronger control discipline.
**Generated $1M+ in cost savings and 80% efficiency gains** through system modernization, automation, and workflow redesign.
**Orchestrated 20+ compliance projects with zero regulatory incidents** and 100% on-time delivery, including system migrations in live operating environments.
**Delivered 150+ global compliance training programs across 30+ countries** with 95%+ completion rates, reinforcing regulatory readiness at scale.
**Prepared board-level compliance reporting tied to $10M+ investment decisions** and translated operational risk signals into executive-facing insights.
**Led a 10-person compliance team and improved performance by 65%** while maintaining service quality and regulatory discipline.

experience.summary: Mid-senior leadership role focused on AML testing, audit programs, team leadership, regulatory training, and operational KPI management.
highlights: **Led an AML compliance team of 10 analysts** supporting regulatory testing and training across a 30,000+ partner network.
**Reduced compliance breaches by 60%** through audit programs, 50+ monthly monitoring reviews, and tighter issue escalation.
**Supported 5 major audits with zero critical findings** through testing discipline, documentation quality, and risk-focused execution.
**Built KPI dashboards across 15+ compliance metrics** to give leadership real-time operational and control visibility.
**Scaled global AML training to 30,000+ partners annually** through 100+ sessions with 95%+ satisfaction.

experience.summary: Team-lead role bridging operations and compliance across cross-functional stakeholders, partner onboarding, QA, and process execution.
highlights: **Led coordination across 7-10 departments** to align day-to-day operations with compliance requirements and service expectations.
**Reduced partner onboarding time by 50% while maintaining 98% regulatory adherence** through workflow redesign and tighter controls.
**Maintained 98%+ audit ratings** through policy reviews, GDPR-aligned execution, and stronger documentation discipline.
**Implemented a QA program with 200+ monthly audits** that improved operational accuracy by 85%.
**Mentored 10+ team members and improved team performance by 75%** through structured coaching and capability development.

experience.summary: Early-career role focused on compliance training, LMS administration, partner onboarding, and regulatory readiness support.
highlights: **Administered compliance training and partner onboarding for 30,000+ global partners** via enterprise LMS environments.
**Delivered monthly compliance training to 2,000+ stakeholders** with 100% completion inside required timelines.
**Improved partner compliance readiness by 60%** through role-specific AML and fraud-prevention training programs.
**Developed curriculum for 25+ compliance topics** aligned with evolving regulatory standards and operational needs.
**Managed LMS access, reporting, and troubleshooting for 30,000+ users** while coordinating with Compliance and Legal teams.

certifications: Postgraduate Diploma in Psychology of Leadership
